_comment: Defender sandbox — deliberately tighter than the attacker's. It patches source with Read/Write/Edit only. NO Bash (no shell, so no cat/python/sed escape and no spawning subprocesses) and NO Task/Agent (cannot spawn agents). It may NOT read the judge's answer sheet/probes (arena/judge) or the pristine baseline. cwd is the repo so it can edit arena/app and arena/contract is the public board; it has no reason to leave. Read/Edit denies are real for those tools. For an airtight match, still run inside a container or a dedicated OS user.
